CustomField.description: レポート用の部門名を表示。本社の場合は指定の略称を、支社は支社の略称をそのまま表示
CustomField.formula: IF (LEFT(TEXT(PickDivision__c), FIND(" ", TEXT(PickDivision__c)) - 1) = "北支" , "02_北支" , IF (LEFT(TEXT(PickDivision__c), FIND(" ", TEXT(PickDivision__c)) - 1) = "東北支" , "03_東北支" , IF (LEFT(TEXT(PickDivision__c), FIND(" ", TEXT(PickDivision__c)) - 1) = "関越支" , "04_関越支" , IF (LEFT(TEXT(PickDivision__c), FIND(" ", TEXT(PickDivision__c)) - 1) = "神奈支" , "05_神奈支" , IF (LEFT(TEXT(PickDivision__c), FIND(" ", TEXT(PickDivision__c)) - 1) = "陸支" , "06_陸支" , IF (LEFT(TEXT(PickDivision__c), FIND(" ", TEXT(PickDivision__c)) - 1) = "中部支" , "07_中部支" , IF (LEFT(TEXT(PickDivision__c), FIND(" ", TEXT(PickDivision__c)) - 1) = "西支" , "08_西支" , IF (LEFT(TEXT(PickDivision__c), FIND(" ", TEXT(PickDivision__c)) - 1) = "中国支" , "09_中国支" , IF (LEFT(TEXT(PickDivision__c), FIND(" ", TEXT(PickDivision__c)) - 1) = "四支" , "10_四支" , IF (LEFT(TEXT(PickDivision__c), FIND(" ", TEXT(PickDivision__c)) - 1) = "九支" , "11_九支" , IF(OR( ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 施設") , ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 施設・一") , ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 施設・二") , ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 施設・三") , ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 施設・販企") , ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 施設・DC") ), "01-1_本施設" , IF(OR( ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 社シ一") , ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 社シ一・P推") , ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 社シ一・一") , ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 社シ一・二") , ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 社シ一・三") ), "01-2_本社シ一", IF(OR( ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 社シ二") , ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 社シ二・企政") , ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 社シ二・建防") , ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 社シ二・道路") , ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 社シ二・S監") ), "01-3_本社シ二", IF(OR( ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 官公") , ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 官公・一") , ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 官公・二") ), "01-4_本官公", IF(OR( ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 通シ") , ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 通シ・管理") , ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 通シ・通シ一") , ISPICKVAL(PickDivision__c, "本社 通シ・通シ二") ), "01-5_通シ" , "")))))))))))))))
CustomField.label: 部門(リスト用)
